response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and a strong background in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and leadership. However, his experience in mobile-platform-specific tools is limited, and his people-management tenure (mostly as a senior developer with some leadership roles) does not fully meet the preferred 2 years of dedicated people management. His technical depth in developer tools (e.g., testing frameworks, CI/CD) is strong, but his industry experience (information services/tech) is less aligned with the mobile platform ecosystem focus.
strengths: Strong technical leadership with hands-on coding experience in developer tools and testing infrastructure
Proven track record in building and optimizing systems (e.g., CI/CD, automation, high-performance services)
Diverse experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, including open-source contributions
concerns: Limited direct experience in mobile-platform-specific developer tools or ecosystems
People management experience is primarily as a senior developer rather than a dedicated manager (2 years preferred)
Industry focus has been broader (web, embedded, data) rather than specifically mobile platform ecosystems
